name: Trail Drivers Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef lightly in oil; add onion and celery and cook until onion is yellow and celery is soft.
2. Add tomato soup; rinse cans and add water.
3. Add beans, spaghetti, and seasonings; put into a 9 1/2 x 13-inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F until hot and bubbly.
5. Grated cheese may be added on top during the last 15 minutes of baking.
